data.body: CI Verified-1 on PS1 was the module-size ratchet gate: the EnsureConfig re-export pushed config.py to 840 LOC (pinned ceiling 839). Fixed by tightening a 4-line import comment to 3 (kept the required re-export) → 839; regenerated docs/env-vars.md for the resulting config.py line-number drift. WS3 (440) failed for the same reason (its tree includes WS2's config.py). Amended WS2 + replayed WS3 (Change-Ids preserved), ran the full CI-parity gate set locally (module-size, public-types/prompt-index/criteria-routing/server-manifest drift, config-check, full default suite 4961 pass) — all green. Re-pushed PS2.
